untranslatable_reason: Signal relies on subjective 'trader senses trend inflection point' and 'loss of momentum sense' which cannot be mechanically expressed. These require discretionary judgment not available in indicator-based rules. Translated directional momentum (close above prior high/low) as proxy, but inflection sensing and momentum loss detection are inherently qualitative.
translation_notes: This is a discretionary/intuitive trading signal that explicitly rejects mechanical confirmation rules. The core concept—entering on trend inflection without waiting for indicators—is fundamentally at odds with rule-based backtesting. Used price action (close > prev_high for long, close < prev_low for short) as the closest mechanizable proxy, but this loses the essence of the original signal which values trader intuition over rules. Stop loss set to stated 1%. Exit conditions are estimated as reversal to prior bar close since original exits depend on 'sense of momentum loss.'
